homebrew.note: not available (custom tap has no public install API)

releases_timeline.summary: Faster convergence: the completion council evaluates the moment work is claimed done
Fix: memory panel is correct and self-consistent on JSON-backed projects
Fix: /api/tasks no longer 500s on a malformed dashboard-state.json
Task list accuracy: honest, stable done column (no empty cards, no duplicates)
Fix: native/Keychain Claude login no longer misread as "not logged in"
Bun doctor checks Claude login (bash/Bun parity)
Default execution model is now Claude Sonnet 5
Bun-runner gate parity + verify.sh hardening
Trust: unknown quality-gate status can no longer read green
CRITICAL trust fix + adoption empty-state + cleanup
Zero-friction: surface the no-key path at every first touch
Zero-friction adoption: offline taste path + shareable receipt badge
Memory retrieval: dimension-mismatch degrades to keyword search
Memory integrity + checklist/cost trust fixes + dashboard reuse (wave-7 hunt)
Council trust-config fixes + zero-friction adoption
Wave-5 hardening: memory, events, healing, provider parity + FIX A rework
Trust moat: council force-review path fails closed
Trust moat: completion gates now fail CLOSED
Reuse done-recognition: a no-PRD reuse run no longer rebuilds finished work
Dashboard fixes: sidebar rebalance, honest App Runner status, stable version
Zero-friction adoption: fail-open preflight, honest failure diagnosis, CLI polish
Fix: green the CI shell suite (caveman moat-audit false positive)
Zero-friction adoption: per-build workspace + fail-fast auth + honest phase state
Cleanup: remove dead keyboard-shortcut and theme-toggle markup
Dashboard polish: a calmer, more readable live view
Proven PR: every PR Loki opens carries its own re-verifiable proof
Plainer language in the live dashboard
Live dashboard + wiki: a polished experience while you watch a build
Finish and own: a plain-English handoff for whoever owns the result
Secure-by-default gate (advisory by default)
The trust story, made visible (honestly)
Evidence Receipt: verify it yourself, Loki never lies about done
Enterprise-grade dashboard overhaul
Fix: loki ship now reviews the work being shipped
UX: less friction, more wow

what_worked.evidence: Adversarial bug-hunt + real gate behavior; no fake-green on partial library load

what_worked.item: Convergence fix: council evaluates on explicit completion claim
what_worked.evidence: test-council-convergence-on-claim.sh RED on pre-fix, GREEN on fix; matches telemetry pathology

what_worked.item: Sonnet 5 as default (~40% cheaper vs Opus, near-frontier intelligence)
what_worked.evidence: Live builds completing; council still 3/3; released npm/Docker/Homebrew

what_worked.item: Auth preflight: keychain login detection (macOS native Claude Code 2.x)
what_worked.evidence: 8-case test suite + live Docker; reproduced false-block, confirmed fix

what_worked.item: Memory panel accuracy (PR #178 + sibling gaps closed)
what_worked.evidence: Live vs anonima project; count and drill-in list agree; contributor PR merged

what_worked.item: Task board honest done column (no empty cards, no dups)
what_worked.evidence: Live vs real anonima, browser screenshots, council 3/3
Implemented at run.sh:10461-10954; catches fake-green before ship

what_worked.item: Zero-friction preflight: catch not-logged-in before build stall
what_worked.evidence: Fails fast with one-step fix; 401 no longer the discovery mechanism

didnt_work.what: wave-7 batch included an embeddings-only signal for anti-pattern memory dedupe; reverted as inert
didnt_work.reason: Added no actual behavior change; core fix was the dedup logic, not the embedding signal

didnt_work.what: PRD-reuse on rerun assumed rebuild-always: a loki start with no PRD over an already-completed project would rebuild the full task queue and re-run the entire RARV loop, redoing finished work
didnt_work.reason: Reuse path never asked 'is this spec already satisfied by current code?'
didnt_work.outcome: Fixed in v7.94.0 with done-recognition gate; rebuild-always approach retired

didnt_work.what: RARV instruction 'There is NEVER a finished state - always find the next improvement' was emitted in every mode, including finite PRD/checkpoint runs - a direct self-contradiction and the prompt root of 14-iteration convergence bug
didnt_work.reason: Intended for perpetual/no-promise mode only; biased model toward redundant self-verification in finite builds
didnt_work.outcome: Mode-aware rarv instruction; finite runs now get stop-when-verified-done directive

didnt_work.what: local-ci.sh parallelized for speed; non-hermetic tests began flaking under concurrent execution, making the gate non-deterministic
didnt_work.reason: Shared temp state between lanes; ordering dependencies not accounted for

mistakes.what: Bun runner FIX A: first attempt used broad blocked||escalated gate that over-blocked clean runs
mistakes.how_fixed: Rewrote to gate only on real code_review BLOCK (hardGates); clean runs complete again

mistakes.what: Completion gates armed with type-probe that silently skipped if council library failed to source; allowed unverified completion (fake-green)
mistakes.how_fixed: Gate chain now verifies core functions are loadable before running; refuses claim if any missing (fail-closed)

mistakes.what: Council force-review path had same fail-open hole: partial library load force-approved completion ungated
mistakes.how_fixed: Force-review now probes core gate functions before approving

mistakes.what: server.py /api/tasks raised AttributeError on malformed dashboard-state.json (non-dict tasks or task groups not lists), 500ing and blanking the whole task board
mistakes.how_fixed: State-group reader now coerces defensively; non-dict tasks treated as empty

mistakes.what: Completion council only evaluated every 5 iterations; build verifiably done at iteration 1 (19/19 tests green, checklist complete) ran 13 more needless iterations. Pathological case: 14 iterations, ~97 min wall-clock for work done in ~2 min
mistakes.caught_by: Real build telemetry (anonima events.jsonl) + speed diagnosis
mistakes.how_fixed: Explicit completion claim now triggers immediate council evaluation; no-claim cadence unchanged

mistakes.what: LOKI_COUNCIL_THRESHOLD operator config was silently ignored; hardcoded 2/3 formula used even when operator set stricter threshold
mistakes.how_fixed: Effective threshold = max(2/3 floor, operator threshold), shared helper at all three vote sites

mistakes.what: v7.81.0 python test registered as command string in run-all-tests.sh but runner exec's via bash; local-ci passed (different contract), CI failed post-push
mistakes.how_fixed: Bash wrapper added; pattern now consistent across both gates

founder_decisions.label: npm registry + package name for @autonomi/verify
founder_decisions.options: Publish @autonomi/verify publicly? Confirm bin name (resolve loki-verify collision)

founder_decisions.label: Hosted /verify deploy target + signing-key storage
founder_decisions.options: Fly / Render / AWS / your infra + secret manager choice

founder_decisions.label: Wire verifyCompletion() pipeline (XL build)
founder_decisions.blocks: Whole SDK/MCP value prop; currently stubbed

founder_decisions.label: Enterprise deploy shape: hosted-multitenant vs on-prem first
Outreach: MCP registry + Glama claim + awesome-list PRs
founder_decisions.blocks: Discovery surface; posts need your nod per action rules
